title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Pudding, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Sanji as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: My dear pudding!:) You're safe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so glad your beautiful face is unhurt!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: PUDDING! Keep it together!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Big Mom's

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: About to break through to the surface!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't have much time! Get to the point, pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: appropped

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You BAS- Tards! You miserable Louis!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd never save you in a million years!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you make it to your ship, it's useless! Mama will chase you lot to the ends of the earth!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And she'll send you to the ocean floor! Ah- Ahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What the?! what was that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No! What?! What are you say- ing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No! No! What am I saying?! Aaah!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "It's gooda Mama's got it in her head that you guys stole her beloved cake. She'll chase you across the oceans!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's right! That's why...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sanji! Come here this instant!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Watch as your friends are killed by big mom! Taste Living Hell! Ahahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No! What?! What are you say- ing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Nooooo! I just want to vanish!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're only here to yell stuff like that, piss off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, wait! No! That's not why we're here!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Black leg Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pudding said that you, too, are quite good at pastry- making.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah! When it comes to cooking, I can do basically anything!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: OK! Then help us make this cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "O'Oddo!" the only thing that can stop mama is the right kind of cake... make it, and she'll let you go free!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: Chiffon...

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: For what you did for Lola!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd lay my life on the line for you all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hmph! While that may be the case,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's not why I'm here! I'm not here for you lot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A cake that I coincidentally wanted to make ended up being the sort that Mama wants!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I C- C-Coincidentally happened to be passing through here, and you guys happened to be here too,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So it's not like I don't want you to die or any- thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I didn't come to help you stop big mom or anything, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My dear...:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "I suppose I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Her emotions are flip-flopping like crazy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Got it. Thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where are we gonna make this thing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The ingredients are in choc- olan!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll make it as fast as we can, and then we'll bring it over here by ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: COCOA Island Chocolatown

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That should be enough to bring Mama back to her senses! Until then, just try and avoid her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we go out to sea, we'll just be exposing ourselves to enemies from head-on, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I believe in you all! You'll be able to make it through this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Okay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll get up there with you all, then!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: W- W- wait just a second! Who said you could get up here?! You idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: panda

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 52 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
